Release notes for Pebble firmware 3.9 with updates to health, MMS, navigation, and more.

# Purpose
The content provides a brief summary of updates and improvements to Pebble software features, including enhancements to Pebble Health, MMS support, Watch-Only mode, and watch navigation. For more detailed information, users are directed to visit the Pebble blog at `blog.getpebble.com`.
